cards.title: Schema, Identity, and Ontology
cards.governance_note: Define entity types, relationship vocabulary, ontology constraints, aliases, identity rules, and correction workflows.

cards.title: Path Retrieval and Provenance
cards.governance_note: Review graph paths, neighborhoods, source evidence, confidence, review status, and traceability.

cards.title: Hybrid Semantic Governance
cards.governance_note: Audit hybrid graph-vector retrieval, inferred relationships, dense-node bias, stale graph state, provenance gaps, and explainability.
